mapper.sql: verify_id, achievement_id, verify_hash, verify_result, chain_record_id, owner_address, record_time, operator_addr, verify_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verify_log(achievement_id, verify_hash, verify_result, chain_record_id, owner_address, record_time, operator_addr) VALUES (#{achievementId}, #{verifyHash}, #{verifyResult}, #{chainRecordId}, LOWER(#{ownerAddress}), #{recordTime}, LOWER(#{operatorAddr}))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM verify_log ORDER BY verify_time DESC LIMIT 500
SELECT FROM verify_log WHERE operator_addr = LOWER(#{operatorAddr}) ORDER BY verify_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM verify_log WHERE verify_result = #{verifyResult}
